description_long: This object is a rectangular, box-like banner resembling a classic video game case, specifically for the Sega Genesis game 'Kittenlla.' The front features vibrant, detailed artwork with a sci-fi theme, including spaceships and pixelated text, while the back displays game information, screenshots, and additional graphics. The sides are narrow and display the game title and Genesis branding, with one side showing a vertical orientation of the title. The surface appears to be made of glossy, printed cardboard or thin plastic, giving it a hard, smooth finish. The object is relatively thin and lightweight, with a small hanging tab at the top, suggesting it is designed to be displayed or hung. The overall appearance is colorful, with dominant tones of blue, red, white, and gray, and the structure is solid but not meant to be entered or walked on.
description: A rectangular, glossy banner styled as a Sega Genesis game case for 'Kittenlla,' featuring vibrant sci-fi artwork and game information on a hard, smooth surface.
description_view_0: Front view shows the colorful 'Kittenlla' artwork and Sega Genesis branding.
description_view_1: Side view reveals the thin profile and vertical title text.
description_view_2: Back view displays game information, screenshots, and additional graphics.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with vertical title and Genesis branding, similar to the other side.
attribute_banner_content: video game cover art and information
